title: NexusAI Dashboard
description: A production-grade AI analytics platform with real-time data visualization, RAG-powered insights, and multi-tenant architecture built with Next.js and PostgreSQL.

title: Velox E-Commerce
description: High-performance e-commerce platform with JWT auth, Stripe payments, inventory management, and a blazing fast React frontend powered by Node.js microservices.

title: DevCollab
description: Real-time collaborative code editor with WebSocket sync, syntax highlighting, live cursors, and GitHub integration — built for distributed engineering teams.
